howItWorks.intro: This depression screening calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Based on PHQ-9 screening principles (simplified 5-item version)
Rate each item: 0=not at all, 1=several days, 2=more than half, 3=nearly every day
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What is the PHQ-9?
faq.answer: The PHQ-9 (Patient Health Questionnaire-9) is the most widely used depression screening tool. It asks about 9 symptoms over the past 2 weeks. A score of 10+ suggests major depressive disorder and warrants professional evaluation.

faq.question: Is this a diagnosis?
faq.answer: No. This is a screening tool, not a diagnostic instrument. Only a qualified healthcare provider can diagnose depression. If your score suggests moderate or severe depression, please consult a mental health professional.

faq.question: What help is available?
faq.answer: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline (call or text 988). Crisis Text Line (text HOME to 741741). Therapy (CBT is very effective for depression). Medication (SSRIs are first-line treatment). Exercise, social connection, and sleep hygiene also help significantly.

faq.question: Is the Depression Screening Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard mental health and wellness formulas trusted by individuals seeking balance. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Depression Screening Calculator?
sections.body: The Depression Screening Calculator is a free online tool designed for individuals seeking balance who need quick, accurate calculations in the mental health and wellness space. By entering your little interest/pleasure, feeling down/hopeless, sleep problems, you get instant results including depression score, severity, recommendation. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting depression score right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In mental health and wellness, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by individuals seeking balance worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to support your mental well-being with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your little interest/pleasure and need to find the right depression score. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Little interest/pleasure (0-3)
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your little interest/pleasure — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: feeling down/hopeless, sleep problems, low energy/fatigue, trouble concentrating. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your depression score, severity, recommendation. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your little interest/pleasure before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both depression score and severity — they work together to give you the full picture.
Bookmark this page for quick access next time you need to support your mental well-being.
If you're unsure about your trouble concentrating, start with a conservative estimate and adjust from there.
